name: roofy-music
description: Local-first personal music app built on Feishin, Navidrome, yt-dlp, and ffmpeg.

scripts.desktop:build: corepack pnpm --dir desktop run build:electron && corepack pnpm --dir desktop run build:remote
scripts.desktop:package:dir: set PATH=%CD%\.tools;%PATH%&& corepack pnpm --dir desktop exec electron-builder --dir
scripts.desktop:typecheck: corepack pnpm --dir desktop run typecheck:node && corepack pnpm --dir desktop run typecheck:web
